title: Developmental milestones assessment in newborn mice (P1–P21)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5f748","text":"A battery of behavioral tests assessing weight gain, reflexes, and coordinated movements in newborn mice from P1 to P21. Designed for fast throughput of multiple litters daily. Measures focus on day of first appearance of each developmental sign. No specialized equipment required. Suitable for evaluating mouse models of human neurodevelopmental disorders.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"blbnm","text":"Experimental cohorts are generated from heterozygous breedings. Wild-type (WT) and knockout (KO) littermates are analyzed within the same litters to control for maternal and environmental effects.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fnmoo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5q76b","text":"Test procedures","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f28ok","text":"Each pup is evaluated on the tests appropriate for its postnatal age. Tests are repeated daily until the pup meets the acquisition criterion on two consecutive days. All behavioral testing and scoring is performed by experimenters blinded to genotype.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"46iai","text":"Setup — daily testing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fh19p","text":"     Move the home cage into the testing room. Allow 1 hour of habituation before testing begins.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6rgui","text":"     Perform all testing at the same time each day to control for circadian influences.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6c1is","text":"     Place pups with a small amount of home cage nesting material in a small bowl, position a 60 W lamp overhead  to supplement heat from above.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e73na","text":"     Weigh each pup individually before behavioral testing begins (record daily weight).","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bdk41","text":"     Assign one observer to manipulate the pup and one to operate the stopwatch and record data.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"56g59","text":"     Tests are performed on laboratory bench paper (smooth side); replace or clean between litters.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"79kdv","text":"Use litter means (not individual pup values) as the unit of statistical analysis to account for litter effects.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"aictn","text":"Top-loading balance","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"73rg4","text":"60 W lamp (supplemental overhead heat)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djqt6","text":"Stopwatch","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"da0pa","text":"Small bowl","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aa1kp","text":"Laboratory bench paper (test surface, cleaned between litters)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1q246","text":"45° inclined mesh screen (negative geotaxis)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5u8d6","text":"Pipette tip box (cliff aversion)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"56d57","text":"Cotton applicator sticks (rooting, ear twitch) — pull tip and twist into a fine filament","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4qqbb","text":"Small horizontal rod suspended over cage (forelimb grasp)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d0at4","text":"Plastic sheet with 13 cm diameter circle drawn (open field traversal)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b77k4","text":"Data recording sheet (one per pup; see Hill et al. for template)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ovcp","text":"Two observers (primary + secondary) per session","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Sensorimotor domain: Reflex — labyrinthine & body righting, strength, coordination %s %s
On P1, weigh each pup and genotype it.
Determine and record sex of each pup.
Use a non-toxic marker or a small identification tattoo to reliably distinguish individual pups.
Sensorimotor domain: Reflex — labyrinthine, strength, coordination %s %s
Sensorimotor domain: Tactile reflex, motor coordination %s %s
Sensorimotor domain: Locomotion — extinguishment of pivoting, limb coordination %s %s
Sensorimotor domain: Reflex — labyrinthine & body righting, coordination %s %s

The unit of analysis is the litter mean, not the individual pup. For each milestone test, calculate the mean postnatal day of acquisition separately for WT and KO pups within each litter. Use these litter means as independent observations in all group comparisons. Apply a nested two-tailed t test. Adjust p-values for multiple comparisons across all nine milestone tests using Bonferroni correction (multiply each raw p-value by 9; significance threshold α = 0.0056).
creator: Sarah van Veen
